chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No. S- 501 of 2022 Mst. Samina and another ------------------- Petitioners VERSUS Province of Sindh & others ----------------- Respondents Dates of hearing: 15.08.2022 Date of decision: 15.08.2022 Mr. Omparkash H. Karmani, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Rafiq Ahmed Dahri, Asstt: A.G. along with ASI Ali Hassan Chandio PS Ali Abad district Shaheed Benazirabad & SIP Muneer Ali Baladi PS Kazi Ahmed district Shaheed Benazirabad O R D E R ADNAN-UL-KARIM MEMON, J-. Through instant petition, the petitioners have sought direction to respondents 1 to 12 to restrain respondents 13 to 18 from harassing the petitioners and further to provide them legal protection. Learned counsel submits that the petitioners contracted free marriage which caused annoyance to private respondents 13 to 18 and the official respondents at the instance of private respondents are causing harassment to them, hence they have filed the instant petition. Upon notice the official respondents have filed comments denying the allegations leveled against them and further stated that they are duty bound to provide legal protection to every citizen being their vested right; therefore, if the petitioners approaches them they will be provided protection as per law. In view of the above, the instant petition is disposed of with direction to the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law, shall not cause any harassment to petitioners and shall provide legal protection to them. JUDGE Karar_hussain/PS*
